---
title: "gaussian_nll"
generated: true
description: "Negative log-likelihood of observations under a diagonal Gaussian."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.gaussian`](../nitrix-stats-gaussian.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:gaussian_nll -->
```python
gaussian_nll(x: Float[Array, '...'], mean: Float[Array, '...'], log_var: Float[Array, '...'], *, axis: Optional[_AxisArg] = None, reduction: Reduction = 'mean') -> Float[Array, '...']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:gaussian_nll -->
Negative log-likelihood of observations under a diagonal Gaussian.

Evaluates the negative log-likelihood of the observations `x` under
the diagonal Gaussian $\mathcal{N}(\mu, e^{\ell})$, where
$\mu$ is `mean` and $\ell$ is the log-variance
`log_var`.

Per element, this is

$$
\tfrac{1}{2}\left(\log(2\pi) + \ell
+ (x - \mu)^2\, e^{-\ell}\right).
$$

The $e^{-\ell}$ precision and the additive $\ell$
normaliser are the log-variance rewrite of the
$1 / (2\sigma^2)$ and $\tfrac{1}{2}\log \sigma^2$
terms of the Gaussian density.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:gaussian_nll -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `x` | `Float` | `...` | — | Observations, of arbitrary shape. |
| `mean` | `Float` | `...` | — | Predicted mean $\mu$, broadcastable to `x`. |
| `log_var` | `Float` | `...` | — | Predicted log-variance $\ell$, broadcastable to `x`. |
| `axis` | `Optional[_AxisArg]` | — | `None` | Axes to reduce over. Default `None` reduces over all axes. |
| `reduction` | `Reduction` | — | `'mean'` | How to reduce the per-element NLL over `axis`. `"mean"` (the default), `"sum"`, or `"none"` to leave it unreduced. |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `...`. The reduced negative log-likelihood: a scalar when `axis` is `None`, otherwise the reduction over `axis`; or the per-element NLL (the broadcast shape of `x`, `mean` and `log_var`) when `reduction="none"`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:gaussian_nll -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
